sentence: Never answer sarcapstically mid-responchalashout. The inbox still sees your face.

wombos.definition: The mature, adult version of a nonchalashout — crashing out internally while continuing to pay bills and answer emails on time.
Sarcastically, with an added layer of cap — saying something so sarcastic it signals the opposite is true. The verbal equivalent of air quotes plus a knowing side-eye.
